cdsiSource: COVID-19 multiple series (Moderna, Pfizer, Novavax, mixed); routine ≥6mo

cases.rationale: CDSI COVID Start at 6mo-23mo. Code line 506 fires am>=6 && !covidThisSeason.

cases.description: <6mo: NO COVID rec (too young per FDA)

cases.rationale: Code line 508: am<60 → Spikevax (≥6mo). Comirnaty is ≥5y per FDA.

cases.description: Brand list age-appropriate: 12y+ → mNexspike & Nuvaxovid available
cases.rationale: Code line 508 includes mNexspike (≥12y) and Nuvaxovid (≥12y, protein subunit non-mRNA option) for am>=144.
